headline: Countdown to Emerson Electric (EMR) Q2 Earnings: A Look at Estimates Beyond Revenue and EPS
summary: Beyond analysts' top-and-bottom-line estimates for Emerson Electric (EMR), evaluate projections for some of its key metrics to gain a better insight into how the business might have performed for the quarter ended March 2026.
